headline: Trump’s Iran blockade resumes, Kevin Warsh says the Fed has ’no tolerance’ for high inflation, and the most expensive dinosaur sold for $50.1 million. Read more in today’s What’s News newsletter:
US launches new round of strikes against Iran as war of Strait of Hormuz threatens critical oil supplies
The House passed legislation supported by President Trump to make daylight-saving time permanent year-round, advancing a longstanding effort to end the twice-a-year time switch nationwide
President Trump’s pick for attorney general, Todd Blanche, ran into headwinds in the Senate on Tuesday, a day ahead of what was expected to be a contentious confirmation hearing
ICE will suspend most vehicle stops in the wake of two deadly shootings
A new bill that had been championed by the late Sen. Lindsey Graham would give Trump fresh authority to impose tariffs on the largest importers of Russian energy
The economy has added jobs for four straight months, yet nearly two million Americans have been locked out of the job market for at least half a year
For Argentina, a World Cup Semifinal Against England Isn’t Just Soccer
Ex-UK government minister Ann Widdecombe killed in ‘targeted attack’ at home but motive still being probed: cops
China economic growth falls sharply, missing target
